query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and ima" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the dependent variable (tabular data representation/embeddings) within the user's specific domain (tabular data), providing foundational work on universal tabular embeddings that is essential for a literature review on multimodal tabular learning benchmarks. It also aligns with criterion (d) as a canonical methodology paper for generating task-independent embeddings of tabular data, which is a core component of the "MulTaBench" context.
